name: Address Collision
description: Multiple entities sharing the same physical address - common indicator of shell companies or fraudulent accounts
indicators: Same address used by multiple persons
Same address used by multiple companies
gsql_query: MATCH (a:Address)<-[:LOCATED_AT]-(e) WITH a, collect(e) as entities WHERE size(entities) >= {threshold} RETURN a, entities
remediation: Verify address legitimacy with supporting documents
Enhanced due diligence on all associated entities
Consider filing SAR if no legitimate explanation
